name: superpowers-codex
description: Codex-only workflow and skills library forked from obra/superpowers.

interface.longDescription: A Codex-specific fork of obra/superpowers focused on design, planning, execution, debugging, and review workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt:
Use the using-superpowers skill first to route the task.
Use brainstorming before implementation planning when design needs exploration.
Use writing-plans after the spec is approved and before touching code for multi-step work.
